overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment at dusk. The scene transitions from beneath an elevated highway through a covered billboard corridor to a neon-lit plaza with red light installations and palm trees.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure casting shadows over the walkway
large cylindrical pillars supporting the overhead highway
modern concrete parking garage with illuminated windows
futuristic red and black automated terminal on the sidewalk
urban street with sparse vehicle traffic visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway, the scene is characterized by concrete support pillars and the shadow of the overpass. A futuristic vending machine stands on the right sidewalk while a multi-story parking structure rises on the left. Sparse pedestrians walk in scattered directions on the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with overhead digital billboards

events.description: enters covered walkway with large overhead digital billboards and advertisements
large holographic anime billboard becomes prominently visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor beneath glowing advertisements and holographic displays

entered.detail: series of large illuminated advertisement screens spanning across the walkway ceiling
large digital display showing animated characters with bright cyan and pink colors
futuristic building entrance with glass and metal construction

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions into a covered commercial walkway dominated by massive overhead digital billboards displaying advertisements. A prominent holographic anime screen glows on the right wall. The crowd density increases as pedestrians walk in the same direction through the artificially lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional walkway with emerging red neon light installations

events.description: red neon pillars become visible ahead, shifting ambient lighting to dominant red glow
passing the large anime billboard as the path opens toward the red neon pillar area

agents.ego_description: approaching the red neon-lit area with palm trees now visible lining the path ahead

entered.detail: tall vertical cylindrical structures emitting bright red neon light
tropical palm trees planted along the walkway center
low concrete dividers separating the walkway from the street

segments.scene_description: As the covered walkway continues, tall red neon pillars emerge in the distance on the right, casting a crimson glow on the surroundings. Palm trees line the center of the walkway, and the holographic anime billboard fades behind as the scene transitions toward a more open plaza area with distinct neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian plaza with vertical red light installations

events.description: walking alongside bright red neon pillars casting intense red illumination on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking past the illuminated red pillars toward the open plaza and building entrance ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated entrance to a modern building with glass facade and red lighting
building facade covered in bright neon advertisements and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment features walking alongside the towering red neon pillars that dominate the right side with their intense crimson glow. The walkway opens into a plaza area with palm trees and a futuristic building entrance ahead. The overhead billboards are now behind, replaced by building-mounted neon signage as the destination approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the oppressive shadows of an urban overpass into a vibrant, neon-lit futuristic plaza. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway, moving past concrete support pillars, a vending machine, and a multi-story parking structure. As the camera advances, the open concrete environment shifts into a covered commercial walkway where the lighting becomes artificial and dominated by massive overhead digital billboards and a glowing holographic anime screen. The scene then expands as the billboards fade behind, giving way to a crimson glow cast by towering red neon pillars and a line of palm trees. Finally, the walkway opens fully into a plaza area, leaving the covered corridor behind to approach a futuristic building entrance under the intense light of building-mounted neon signage.
